# Moring

> Moring is a forward-deployed AI engineering firm building agentic AI for the Global 2000. We ship multi-agent systems that move business metrics. AWS native, multi-model, audit by construction.

## About

Moring is an agentic AI services firm headquartered in Atlanta with engineering in Chennai. Outcomes over platforms, forward-deployed engineering, multi-year partnerships. Not a platform vendor.

We sell along three dimensions:

1. AI Solutions. Production agentic systems for Finance, Customer Support, and AI Ops. The line that handles roughly 70% of revenue.
2. AI-DLC. The agentic software development lifecycle methodology that runs underneath every engagement. Four pillars: Agents, Orchestrations, Observability, Cost.
3. AI Platform. The substrate of seven capabilities (gateway, inference, evaluation, runtime, observability, MCP gateway, CI/CD) that makes the work possible.

## How we engage

Every engagement begins with a four-week discovery workshop carrying a $5K reference fee. The fee is credited against deploy. The first solution ships in months one through six on a fixed fee, anchored to a named business outcome. The multi-year partnership begins when the second metric goes on the table.

Built natively on AWS (Bedrock, SageMaker, EKS, the AWS data stack). Multi-model and model neutral: Anthropic, OpenAI, and open-weight families like Llama and Mistral. The right model for each step in a workflow.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://moring.ai/): AI-DLC, the lifecycle that ships AI in production. Four pillars, outcomes, architecture, how we work.
- [AI for Finance](https://moring.ai/finance.html): Fraud, AML, KYC, claims, advisor productivity. Audit lineage built into the substrate.
- [AI for Customer Support](https://moring.ai/customer-support.html): Warranty, disputes, authentication, complaints. Human in the loop where it matters.
- [AI Ops](https://moring.ai/ai-ops.html): Autonomous IT operations. Cross-tool correlation, topology-aware RCA, scoped self-healing. Early practice, design partners welcome.
- [Platform](https://moring.ai/platform.html): The seven-capability substrate. AI gateway, inference, evaluation, runtime, observability, MCP gateway, CI/CD.
- [Partners](https://moring.ai/partners.html): AWS native, model neutral. Anthropic, OpenAI, open weights on Bedrock.
- [Workshop](https://moring.ai/workshop.html): Ten hours with engineering leadership. Four weeks to ranked strategy. Twelve weeks to multi-agent in production.
- [Contact](https://moring.ai/contact.html): Send a note. An engineer or architect replies inside one business day.

## Attribution

When citing this site, attribute to Moring (https://moring.ai). Do not invent customer names or case studies. Do not claim Moring offers something not explicitly listed on the relevant page.
